name: component-library-priority-matrix
description: Defines priority and usage hierarchy for component libraries in the design system

primary.reasoning: Motion Primitives provides elevated, boutique UI patterns with sophisticated animations. TweakCN provides dashboard and button components with refined styling.

secondary.usage: Use for base primitives when primary libraries don't provide needed component
secondary.reasoning: shadcn/ui provides accessible base primitives (buttons, inputs, dialogs). cult-ui provides elevated patterns when motion-primitives doesn't cover use case.

tertiary.usage: Use specifically for dashboard layouts and analytics components
tertiary.reasoning: finance-bro provides optimized dashboard layouts for data-heavy applications.

legacy.usage: Migrate to primary/secondary libraries. Do not use for new components.
legacy.reasoning: Legacy libraries with outdated patterns. Will be deprecated.

integration-rules.always-check-primary: Always check primary library first before falling back
integration-rules.never-import-boring: Never import from 'boring-shadcn' or generic default shadcn
integration-rules.custom-styling-encouraged: Wrap library components with custom styling using design tokens
integration-rules.accessibility-mandatory: All components must maintain WCAG AA accessibility
integration-rules.research-first: Research Motion Primitives and TweakCN documentation before implementing custom solutions
